tagline: The category-founding biohazard remediation franchise with home-based operations and proven referral economics built on essential services that hold steady across economic cycles.
description_short: Bio-One owners manage a small team and build referral relationships with first responders, property managers, and insurance contacts rather than performing field work. With a $134K entry point, no storefront, and 140+ locations nationwide, this is a scalable option for community-focused executives seeking meaningful essential-services ownership.
market_intelligence_insight: The biohazard and crime scene cleanup market reached $4.1B globally in 2024 growing at 8.7% CAGR through 2033; the broader home decontamination services market is valued at $5B in 2024 and projected to reach $11.3B by 2034, driven by aging demographics, stricter public health regulations, and rising biohazard awareness.
item_19_headline: Top quartile of 110 reporting franchisees averaged $802,263 in 2025 annual revenue.
ongoing_support: dedicated franchise business consultants,ongoing coaching and performance check-ins,best-practice sharing from owner network,annual conference
